name: Grilled Zucchini
description: This Grilled Zucchini is an easy way to cook zucchini.  It only has 4 ingredients, and it grills up nice and crisp with plenty of flavor.
recipeInstructions: Preheat. Set your grill on High (450-500 degrees F) for direct grilling.
Slice zucchini. Rinse zucchini and pat dry. Slice in half, width-wise, and then cut each half into quarters.

Marinate. Place zucchini in a gallon zip top bag, then add in your marinade ingredients. Toss to evenly coat every piece. Place in the refrigerator and let the zucchini marinate for at least 2-3 hours.

Grill. Place the zucchini on the grill, flesh side down. Season with additional salt and black pepper, to taste. Grill for 2 minutes per side, or until the flesh is slightly charred and the zucchini is crisp and tender.
Serve and enjoy. Remove to a platter and serve immediately.

ai.cliffNotes: Marinate zucchini strips in oil and vinegar for 2-3 hours, then grill flesh-side down over high heat for quick charring that keeps the interior tender.
keyTips: Pat zucchini completely dry before marinating to help it absorb flavor and char properly on the grill
Marinate for the full 2-3 hours so the zucchini absorbs the garlic and balsamic flavors throughout
Grill flesh-side down first to develop char and crust while keeping the interior from overcooking
Watch timing carefully—2 minutes per side is tight; charred exterior with tender flesh is the target, not mushy zucchini
